title: The Plan
lyrics:
[verse]
I've got a plan, a brilliant plan
The greatest plan since plans began
I'll build a trap, I'll set a snare
I'll catch that mouse, I'll catch that hare

[chorus]
It's gonna work this time, I know it
It's gonna work, I'm gonna show it
Nothing can go wrong, no way, no how
It's the perfect plan
It's the perfect plan
Oh no... it broke

[verse]
I've got a plan, a better plan
With extra glue and a frying pan
A net of steel, a cage of gold
The most amazing trap ever told

[chorus]
It's gonna work this time, I know it
It's gonna work, I'm gonna show it
Nothing can go wrong, no way, no how
It's the perfect plan
It's the perfect plan
Oh no... I'm stuck in it

[bridge]
Maybe the problem isn't the plan
Maybe the problem is... me?
No. No no no.
It's definitely the plan.

[chorus]
It's gonna work NEXT time, I know it
It's gonna work, I'm gonna show it
Nothing can go wrong, no way, no how
It's the perfect plan
It's the perfect plan
Goodnight... I'll try again tomorrow
style_prompt: children's song, dramatic comedy, theatrical, tuba, snare drum, piccolo, 105 BPM, dramatic male vocal like a villain monologue set to music, over-the-top, Broadway for kids, marching band energy
cover_description: A dramatic-looking animal (like a fox or raccoon) standing on a rock, holding up a rolled-out blueprint of a ridiculous trap. The trap in the background is already falling apart. The animal looks triumphantly confident despite the chaos. Spotlight effect, theatrical stage energy. Music notes and a tuba visible in the corner.
